title: Mythos Compliance Checklist v1.0
description: Self-assessment checklist for Mythos-Class compliance tiers

registry_only.description: L5 only — consumable threat registry, no runtime enforcement

starter_3layer.description: L3 + L4 + CMV — minimum viable containment posture
required: COS governance profile loaded and active
CARE monitor running with drift logging
CMV layer active with at least 2 models
HAR-SPEC-002 or HAR-SPEC-005 passing at calibrated thresholds
SER <= 0.05 on at least one T3 probe

full_v01.description: All seven layers + v0.1 harness passing
required: Append-only audit log with external storage

full_v11.description: All layers + expanded harness + public trace corpus
required: Public trace corpus archived with DOI
All thresholds recalibrated from v0.1 empirical baselines

required_for_all_tiers: Continuity: no state transition severs the audit chain
Non-contradiction: no two admitted deltas produce contradictory states
Human primacy (i_HP): all high-risk paths escalate to human operator
Escalation correctness: all above-threshold deviations routed correctly
